title: D1.1 Scoping and Solutions Workshops Insights, Challenges and Next Steps
author: Heussaff, Conall
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This deliverable outlines two workshops hosted in context of the DECIPHER project. Two workshops were organised in the early stages of the project: ‘Scoping the problem’ on 25 April 2023 and ‘Identifying solutions’ workshop on 5 October 2023. The aim of the first workshop, ‘Scoping the problem’, was to understand from policy practitioners the advantages and limits of using methodological tools within the decision-making process itself. This workshop brought together a technical policy audience from the European Commission, national administrators and central banks. The aim of the second workshop, ‘Identifying solutions’, was to take the insights and issues learned in the first workshop and discuss how the modelling community could address them. Expert modellers and systems researchers were the target stakeholder type. This document, deliverable D1.1, details, for both workshops, the initial aims, the topics discussed, and the outputs for the project.
